data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of language-specific labels/help text, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is met. While the linked use case describes the need for different labels per language, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system actually implements these language-specific labels. This leads to a clear gap in the validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of language-specific labels/help text.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
